318 I6100_PTSD_CD I6100_PTSD_CD I6100 Active Diagnoses: Post-traumatic Stress Disorder (PTSD) Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had an active diagnosis of post-traumatic stress disorder (PTSD) in the last seven days. -=Not assessed/no information
